name: Vegetable Jambalaya
recipeIngredient: 1 Red bell pepper, seeded and chopped
1 Green bell pepper, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large, heavy pot.
2. Add the onion and cook over low heat until wilted for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Add the garlic, celery, and carrots. Cook, stirring, for an additional minute.
4. Mix in the spices (thyme, paprika, salt, cayenne pepper, bay leaf).
5. Add the bell peppers, black-eyed peas, tomatoes with juices, and vegetable broth. Bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat to medium-low and cook, partially covered, for 10 minutes until flavors blend.
7. Adjust seasonings as needed.
8. About half an hour before serving, add the zucchini and bring the mixture back to a boil.
9. Stir in the rice and cover. Reduce heat to low and cook for 20 minutes.
10. Stir in the parsley just before serving.
Notes: After adding the rice, ensure you do not cook the dish any longer than the specified 20 minutes. Make sure to use the exact amount of broth as indicated.
Serving Ideas: Serve with fresh cole slaw, tomatoes, catfish, or crab cakes.
